channel.title: Catalogue on AlisonT Design
channel.description: Recent content in Catalogue on AlisonT Design

item.title: Basic Black Euro
item.author: alisontdesign@gmail.com (AlisonT Design)
item.description:
PRODUCT DETAILS
#

  • 3D-printed, solid block characters
  • MIPA 2K-HS-Klarlack CS95 clearcoat (Germany)
  • UV, Chemical resistant
  • Adhesive bonded (No gap between alphabets and baseplate)
  • 3mm thick Glossy or Matt Satin Casted Acrylic (Laser-cut) (Not laminated)
  • Clearly visible at all Distance and Angles
  • VEP/ANPR Friendly (readable by camera systems at customs and condominium gantries)
  • Can be sanded down
  • Crafted locally in Singapore

item.title: Basic Flat White
item.author: alisontdesign@gmail.com (AlisonT Design)

item.title: Carbon Weave
item.author: alisontdesign@gmail.com (AlisonT Design)
item.description:
PRODUCT DETAILS
#

  • 2 Option choices. Metallic/ Matt Carbon. (Not sticker, Not hydrodip)
  • Laminated with Oracal Road Safety Reflective. (Compliant Standard)
  • UV resistant
  • Chemical resistant
  • Adhesive bonded (No gap between alphabets and baseplate)
  • 3mm thick Glossy Casted Acrylic (Laser-cut)
  • Clearly visible at all Distance and Angles
  • VEP/ANPR Friendly (readable by camera systems at customs and condominium gantries)
  • Crafted locally in Singapore

item.description:

  • UV resistant

  • 3mm thick Glossy Casted Acrylic (Laser-cut)
  • Clearly visible at all Distance and Angles
  • VEP/ANPR Friendly (readable by camera systems at customs and condominium gantries)
  • Crafted locally in Singapore

item.title: Glossy Black Euro

PRODUCT DETAILS
#

  • 3D-printed, solid block characters
  • MIPA 2K-HS-Klarlack CS95 clearcoat (Germany)
  • UV, Chemical resistant
  • Adhesive bonded (No gap between alphabets and baseplate)
  • 3mm thick Glossy or Matt Satin Casted Acrylic (Laser-cut) (Not laminated)
  • Clearly visible at all Distance and Angles
  • VEP/ANPR Friendly (readable by camera systems at customs and condominium gantries)

item.title: Glossy White
item.author: alisontdesign@gmail.com (AlisonT Design)

item.title: Metallic Silver
item.author: alisontdesign@gmail.com (AlisonT Design)
item.description:
PRODUCT DETAILS
#

  • Solid block characters
  • MIPA 2K-HS-Klarlack CS95 clearcoat (Germany)
  • MIPA Metallic Silver Spray-painted
  • 2 options (Small/Big Flakes)
  • UV Chemical resistant
  • Adhesive bonded (No gap between alphabets and baseplate)
  • 3mm thick Glossy or Matt Satin Casted Acrylic (Laser-cut)
  • (Not laminated)
  • Clearly visible at all Distance and Angles
  • VEP/ANPR Friendly (readable by camera systems at customs and condominium gantries)
  • Crafted locally in Singapore

item.title: Pearl Black
item.author: alisontdesign@gmail.com (AlisonT Design)
item.description:
PRODUCT DETAILS
#

  • Solid block characters
  • Laminated with Oracal Road Safety Reflective. (Compliant Standard)
  • MIPA 2K-HS-Klarlack CS95 clearcoat (Germany)
  • MIPA Pearl Coating Spray-painted
  • UV Chemical resistant
  • Adhesive bonded (No gap between alphabets and baseplate)
  • 3mm thick Glossy or Matt Satin Casted Acrylic (Laser-cut)
  • (Not laminated)
  • Clearly visible at all Distance and Angles
  • VEP/ANPR Friendly (readable by camera systems at customs and condominium gantries)
  • Crafted locally in Singapore

item.title: Rainbow Stars
item.author: alisontdesign@gmail.com (AlisonT Design)
item.description:
PRODUCT DETAILS
#

  • Not Sticker, Not Spraypainted
  • Laminated with Oracal Road Safety Reflective. (Compliant Standard)
  • UV resistant
  • Chemical resistant
  • Adhesive bonded (No gap between alphabets and baseplate)
  • 3mm thick Glossy Casted Acrylic (Laser-cut)
  • Clearly visible at all Distance and Angles
  • VEP/ANPR Friendly (readable by camera systems at customs and condominium gantries)
  • Rainbow stars can be hidden with layer of oil.
  • Crafted locally in Singapore
